summary: First iteration full E2E test of KantongKu. 21/21 backend pytest tests PASSED. Frontend flows verified: splash, login (reviewer shortcut), dashboard (balance Rp 22.925.000, PRO badge), bottom nav (Beranda/Kalender/FAB/Analisis/Profil), calendar with per-day markers, add-transaction form, analysis donut+legend, debts tabs, budgets over-budget pill 'Melebihi Anggaran', wallets freemium notice for free user (1/2), Pro pricing Rp 29.000/bulan, QRIS mock payment → PRO badge, privacy-policy publicly accessible, register creates free user with default Tunai wallet. Theme toggle works and persists in localStorage kk_theme.

issues: Uses native HTML datetime-local browser default picker instead of a shadcn Calendar component — inconsistent with the rest of the app's UI system. Consider replacing with shadcn Calendar + Popover.

action_items: (Optional/polish) Replace native <input type=datetime-local> on /tambah with shadcn Calendar component for consistency.

(Minor) CORS middleware uses allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject this combination for credentialed requests. Currently works because frontend + backend share the same origin via ingress, but consider setting explicit origin(s) for defense-in-depth.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 638 lines — approaching the 700-line threshold. Consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/wallets.py, etc.
CORS: allow_origins=['*'] + allow_credentials=True is a spec violation per CORS; works only because same-origin via ingress. Not blocking, but flag.
seed_reviewer() correctly updates password on every startup (upsert-set) — good idempotency. bcrypt hash format $2b$ verified via successful login.
test_credentials: reviewer@spendly.com / ReviewerPassword123! (premium seed, confirmed working). Free registration works with any email + password >=6 chars.
seed_data_creation: Reviewer auto-seeded by backend on startup: 5 wallets, 15 transactions, 4 debts, 5 budgets. Tests also created transient TEST_ prefixed users and cleaned up transactions/debts/budgets.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend and frontend both fully functional. Testids well-placed: login-*, dashboard-total-balance, dashboard-pro-badge, nav-*, calendar-month-label, analysis-type-expense/income, debts-tab-payable/receivable, budget-over-*, wallets-freemium-notice, pro-pay-qris, pro-pay-bank, pro-simulate-success-btn, theme-toggle-btn. Note: bottom-nav is hidden on /tambah form page (expected). Pro page hides pay buttons when user is already premium (expected). Theme uses `dark` class on <html> and localStorage key `kk_theme` with values 'light'/'dark'.
